channel.title: Stable-Diffusion on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stable-Diffusion on Arrans github.io

item.title: huggingface/diffusers
item.description: 🤗 Diffusers: State-of-the-art diffusion models for image and audio generation in PyTorch and FLAX.

item.title: comfyanonymous/ComfyUI
item.description: The most powerful and modular stable diffusion GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.title: AbdBarho/stable-diffusion-webui-docker
item.description: Easy Docker setup for Stable Diffusion with user-friendly UI

item.title: LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
item.description: Multi-Platform Package Manager for Stable Diffusion

item.title: invoke-ai/InvokeAI
item.description: InvokeAI is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models, empowering professionals, artists, and enthusiasts to generate and create visual media using the latest AI-driven technologies. The solution offers an industry leading WebUI, supports terminal use through a CLI, and serves as the foundation for multiple commercial products.

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open-source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference

item.title: vladmandic/automatic
item.description: SD.Next: Advanced Implementation of Stable Diffusion and other Diffusion-based generative image models

item.title: fboulnois/stable-diffusion-docker
item.description: Run the official Stable Diffusion releases in a Docker container with txt2img, img2img, depth2img, pix2pix, upscale4x, and inpaint.

item.title: kabachuha/sd-webui-text2video
item.description: Auto1111 extension implementing text2video diffusion models (like ModelScope or VideoCrafter) using only Auto1111 webui dependencies
